headline: lululemon athletica inc. (LULU) Is a Trending Stock: Facts to Know Before Betting on It
summary: Zacks.com users have recently been watching Lululemon (LULU) quite a bit. Thus, it is worth knowing the facts that could determine the stock's prospects.

headline: Lululemon Board Refresh With Chip Bergh And What It Means For Valuation
summary: Lululemon athletica (NasdaqGS:LULU) has appointed former Levi Strauss CEO Chip Bergh to its Board of Directors. The company announced a leadership transition alongside Bergh's appointment, with long serving director David Mussafer planning to retire from the board. The moves are part of Lululemon's broader board refresh efforts during a period of international expansion. Lululemon, best known for its premium athletic and lifestyle apparel, operates at the intersection of activewear, casual...

headline: The 5 Most Interesting Analyst Questions From Lululemon’s Q4 Earnings Call
summary: Lululemon’s fourth quarter saw management address persistent challenges in its core North American market, with particular focus on restoring full-price sales and managing the impact of higher tariffs. Interim Co-CEO and CFO Meghan Frank pointed to new product launches such as Unrestricted Power and ThermoZen as drivers of “great green shoots,” but acknowledged that markdowns and tariff headwinds continued to weigh on margins.
